problems.title: Sort an Array
problems.pattern: Direct Merge Sort implementation — baseline practice for the divide, recurse, merge structure

problems.title: Merge Sorted Array
problems.pattern: Pure merge step in-place — tests mastery of the two-pointer merge without the recursive framework

problems.title: Merge Two Sorted Lists
problems.pattern: Merge step on linked lists — pointer rewiring instead of index copying, building block for #148

problems.title: Sort List
problems.pattern: Merge Sort on a linked list — slow-fast pointer to find midpoint, then recursive sort and merge

problems.title: Count of Smaller Numbers After Self
problems.pattern: Modified merge step counts cross-half inversions — tracking original indices through sort

problems.title: Reverse Pairs
problems.pattern: Count inversions with a stricter condition (i < j and nums[i] > 2 * nums[j]) during the merge step
